# Atlas Home Pro

> Atlas Home Pro is Los Angeles's complete home services company, offering seven trades under one roof: HVAC, Plumbing, Electrical, Roofing, Painting, Pest Control, and Water Damage Restoration. Licensed, insured, and trusted by thousands of LA homeowners.

## Company Info

- Business Name: Atlas Home Pro (DBA Atlas Home Builders Inc.)
- Address: 145 S Fairfax Ave Suite 200, Los Angeles, CA 90036
- Phone: (213) 275-2210
- Email: hello@atlashomepro.com
- Website: https://atlashomepro.com
- Service Area: Los Angeles County — Beverly Hills, Santa Monica, West Hollywood, Koreatown, Silver Lake, and 20+ neighborhoods
- Hours: Available 24/7 for emergencies; standard hours 7 days a week

## Services

### HVAC
- [AC Repair](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/ac-repair/)
- [AC Installation](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/ac-installation/)
- [Heating Services](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/heating/)
- [Duct Cleaning](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/duct-cleaning/)
- [Thermostat Installation](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/thermostat/)
- [HVAC Tune-Up](https://atlashomepro.com/hvac/tune-up/)

### Plumbing
- [Drain Cleaning](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/drain-cleaning/)
- [Water Heater Services](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/water-heater/)
- [Leak Detection](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/leak-detection/)
- [Sewer Line Services](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/sewer-line/)
- [Repiping](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/repiping/)
- [Fixture Installation](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/fixtures/)
- [Emergency Plumbing](https://atlashomepro.com/plumbing/emergency/)

### Electrical
- [Electrical Services](https://atlashomepro.com/electrical/)

### Roofing
- [Roof Repair](https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/roof-repair/)
- [Roof Replacement](https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/roof-replacement/)
- [Roof Inspection](https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/roof-inspection/)
- [Emergency Leak Repair](https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/emergency-leak/)
- [Gutters & Drainage](https://atlashomepro.com/roofing/gutters/)

### Painting
- [Interior Painting](https://atlashomepro.com/painting/interior/)
- [Exterior Painting](https://atlashomepro.com/painting/exterior/)
- [Cabinet Refinishing](https://atlashomepro.com/painting/cabinet-refinishing/)
- [Drywall Repair](https://atlashomepro.com/painting/drywall-repair/)
- [Color Consultation](https://atlashomepro.com/painting/color-consultation/)

### Water Damage Restoration
- [Water Damage Restoration](https://atlashomepro.com/restoration/)

### Gates & Welding
- [Gates & Welding Services](https://atlashomepro.com/gates-welding/)

## Key Facts
- 500+ five-star reviews across platforms
- $0 service call fees
- Same-day service available
- Licensed and insured
- Serves 20+ Los Angeles neighborhoods
- One company for all home service needs
